mapper.select:
/* OrgnCnptUserDataMapper.getTmntCntrList*/ SELECT ORGN_ID AS orgnId , ORGN_ID AS usrId , ORGN_NM AS orgnNm , HGHR_ORGN_CD AS hghrOrgnCd , CASE WHEN LENGTHB(ORGN_NM) > 50 THEN SUBSTR(ORGN_NM , 0,16) ELSE ORGN_NM END AS orgnSubstrNm FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE TYPE_CD = '30' AND TYPE_DTL_CD1 = 'ST' AND ORGN_ID LIKE 'V%'
ORDER BY REG_DTTM ASC
mapper.insert: /*OrgnCnptUserDataMapper.insertCnptUserData*/ INSERT /*+ append_values */ INTO CMN_USR_MST ( USR_ID,ORGN_ID,ATTC_SCTN_CD,USR_NM,PASS, MBLPHN_NUM,USG_YN,PASS_LAST_RVISN_DT,PASS_INIT,REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{orgnId}, '30', #{orgnSubstrNm},#{pass}, #{mngrMphonNo},'Y',TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'Y','SYSTEM', SYSDATE )

/*OrgnCnptUserDataMapper.insertCnptUserDataHst*/ INSERT INTO CMN_USR_HST ( USR_ID,SEQ_NUM,ATTC_SCTN_CD,USR_NM,PASS, TEL_NUM,MBLPHN_NUM,PASS_ERR_NUM,PRES_BIZ,EMAIL, POS,ODTY,ADDR,DTL_ADDR,ZIPCD, FAX,PASS_ATMT_NUM,DEL_YN,REGST_ID,REGST_DTTM, RVISN_ID,RVISN_DTTM,DEPT,IP_INFO,MAC_ADDR, USG_YN,USG_STRT_DT,USG_END_DT,PASS_LAST_RVISN_DT,MNGR_RULE, MSK_AUTH_YN,ORGN_ID,PASS_INIT,DEL_RSN,KOS_ID ) SELECT USR_ID,(SELECT NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER (SEQ_NUM))+1,1) FROM CMN_USR_HST WHERE USR_ID = USR_ID),ATTC_SCTN_CD,USR_NM,PASS, TEL_NUM,MBLPHN_NUM,PASS_ERR_NUM,PRES_BIZ,EMAIL, POS,ODTY,ADDR,DTL_ADDR,ZIPCD, FAX,PASS_ATMT_NUM,DEL_YN,REGST_ID,REGST_DTTM, USR_ID,SYSDATE,DEPT,IP_INFO,MAC_ADDR, USG_YN,USG_STRT_DT,USG_END_DT,PASS_LAST_RVISN_DT,MNGR_RULE, MSK_AUTH_YN,ORGN_ID,PASS_INIT,DEL_RSN,KOS_ID FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = #{userId}
